description.en: Attacks an enemy and <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> the ally with the lowest current Health by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、残りHPが最も低い味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 회복시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使生命值最低的友军恢复<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>。

description.jp: 対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。

description.en: Heals all allies by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> and removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color>. The healing is increased by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> on targets inflicted with a debuff.
description.jp: 味方全体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復し、<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。弱体効果がある対象には、HP回復量が追加で<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>UPする。
description.kr: 아군 전체의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 회복시키고 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제시킵니다. 약화 효과를 보유한 대상은 회복량이 추가로 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 증가합니다.
description.zh: 使全体友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>,并解除<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>。使附带弱化效果的目标,恢复量额外提升<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nGrants increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color> at the start of battle. (Irremovable)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。(解除不可)
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다. (해제 불가)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。(无法解除)

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, your Priority increases by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分の行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>増加する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 종료 시 자신의 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>증가합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,自身行动值+<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
